approach_chosen.BUG-WALLET-01: Option B — render wallet state (WalletOverviewV3/WalletEmptyStateV3/WalletSkeletonV3) as background layer in V3ConvertPage. No duplicate hook calls (uses existing useWallet()). ConvertOverlayV3 (position:fixed) overlays the wallet state naturally.
